privileged_info_summary: I confirmed that this task is a generative synthetic exercise requiring the creation of a new purchase order from scratch. I verified the expected PO name ('Network Infrastructure - Office Buildout Phase 1'), vendor ('Cisco Systems'), due date ('2025-06-30'), and required line item quantities and unit prices (10 x $4250, 5 x $1150) match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt. Additionally, the expected total of $48,250.00 is mathematically correct based on the line items.
